issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Migrate webpack config (babel/css/file loaders) to Rspack
scenarios.rationale: Baseline renamed the config and installed Rspack but kept babel-loader, css-loader/style-loader, and file-loader; treatment switched to builtin:swc-loader, type: 'css', and type: 'asset' as documented.

scenarios.name: New Rspack + React + TypeScript + Tailwind project
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used ts-loader and ad-hoc CSS rules; treatment scaffolded with npm create rspack@latest, configured builtin:swc-loader with TSX and React automatic runtime, and used postcss-loader with type: 'css' for Tailwind.
